text:
--000e0cd5926c85ce85048c7e89d8
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=ISO-8859-1
 
 Well I have the same card and system as the PR submitter. I can confirm that
 on my system I get scan results and the ath driver associates with the AP,
 but then it hangs. I get this message in /var/log/messages, "kernel: ath0:
 bb hang detected, resetting." This message occurs approximately 12-30
 seconds after the chip associates with AP router.
 
 --000e0cd5926c85ce85048c7e89d8--
